assessment.note: She names a concrete near-term focus, which gives some priority clarity and intent, but the emphasis on stabilizing and reducing reactive work signals mild strain; [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] 'stabilizing and reducing reactive work' could be worth unpacking next session.

new_queue.label: Support asked for
new_queue.name: What do you want from me that would actually change your week?
new_queue.description: Clarifies the manager support Nina wants in practical terms, not vague reassurance.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: Given what we've talked about, where do you want to focus first in the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the conversation into a concrete near-term commitment.
